title: thelypteris polyphylla
intro: Thelypteris polyphylla, also known as the Many-leafed fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris polyphylla include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and ointments, which are commonly used to treat various ailments in folk medicine.
